surface-sunken.$description: App canvas behind flat surfaces (page background).

surface.$description: Default surface: cards, panels, page content areas.

surface-hovered.$description: Hover overlay on interactive surface rows/cells.

usage.where: The hovered state of elements filled with bg/surface.
usage.how: Bind to the hovered interaction in component variants; never as a resting fill.
usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.
usage.dont: Don't use as a default fill — resting surfaces use bg/surface.

surface-pressed.$description: Pressed overlay on interactive surface rows/cells.

usage.where: The pressed state of elements filled with bg/surface.
usage.how: Bind to the pressed interaction in component variants; never as a resting fill.
usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.
usage.dont: Don't use as a default fill — resting surfaces use bg/surface.

surface-raised.$description: Raised surface: sticky bars, popover-adjacent panels.

usage.where: The hovered state of elements filled with bg/surface-raised.
usage.how: Bind to the hovered interaction in component variants; never as a resting fill.
usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.

usage.how: Bind to the pressed interaction in component variants; never as a resting fill.
usage.do: Keep state transitions quick (100–150ms) and consistent.
usage.dont: Don't use as a default fill — resting surfaces use bg/surface-raised.

usage.how: Bind to the hovered interaction in component variants; never as a resting fill.

usage.dont: Don't use as a default fill — resting surfaces use bg/surface-overlay.

neutral-subtle.$description: Secondary text: captions, helper text, metadata.

selected.$description: Text in selected menu items, tabs, rows.

accent-subtle.$description: Quiet brand text on brand tints.

danger.$description: Danger text: errors, destructive labels. (Dark step normalized to match icon ramp.)

danger-bold.$description: High-emphasis danger text on danger-subtle fills.

success-bold.$description: High-emphasis success text on success-subtle fills.

warning-bold.$description: High-emphasis warning text on warning-subtle fills.

info-bold.$description: High-emphasis info text on info-subtle fills.

on-accent.$description: Text on bg/accent (solid brand fills). Contrast-lint pair.

on-status-warning.$description: Text on bg/status/warning (yellow needs dark text). Contrast-lint pair.

on-status-info.$description: Text on bg/status/info (teal needs dark text). Contrast-lint pair.

accent-subtle.$description: Quiet brand icons on brand tints.

neutral-subtle-hovered.$description: Hovered hairline border. (Normalized monotonic from reference.)

neutral-subtle-pressed.$description: Pressed hairline border. (Normalized monotonic from reference.)

neutral-bold-hovered.$description: Hovered strong border. (Normalized from reference collision.)

neutral-bold-pressed.$description: Pressed strong border. (Normalized from reference collision.)

focused.$description: Focus ring. (Strengthened from reference blue/200 for 3:1 non-text contrast.)

danger.$description: Danger border: error inputs, alert outlines.

1.$description: Categorical chart series 1. Assign in order; never use for UI semantics.

2.$description: Categorical chart series 2. Assign in order; never use for UI semantics.

3.$description: Categorical chart series 3. Assign in order; never use for UI semantics.

4.$description: Categorical chart series 4. Assign in order; never use for UI semantics.

5.$description: Categorical chart series 5. Assign in order; never use for UI semantics.

6.$description: Categorical chart series 6. Assign in order; never use for UI semantics.

7.$description: Categorical chart series 7. Assign in order; never use for UI semantics.

8.$description: Categorical chart series 8. Assign in order; never use for UI semantics.

close.$description: Shadow color for tight, close elevation.

diffuse.$description: Shadow color for large, diffuse elevation.
